steps.title: Translate the percentages
steps.content:
The first relationship says
$$
0.86h=0.43j
$$
The second says
$$
j=0.34k
$$

steps.title: Write h in terms of k
steps.content:
Since $0.86=2(0.43)$, the first equation gives
$$
2h=j
$$
Substitute $j=0.34k$:
$$
2h=0.34k
$$
$$
h=0.17k
$$

steps.title: Convert to a percentage
steps.content: The equation $h=0.17k$ means $h$ is $17\%$ of $k$. The answer is 17.
